projects.name: GRDN
projects.note: v1.11.2 — TestFlight post-action added to the Xcode Cloud workflow; a build is now running and will land in TestFlight automatically.
projects.nextStep: Once the build lands in TestFlight, test it and submit for App Store review when ready.

projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: v1.5.0 — reimagined: 2 photos, ML + geometry extract anatomical control points (5 toe tips, ball widths, arch, heel) into a 2-D sole outline. 3-D dropped. Verified on synthetic data only.
projects.nextStep: Do a real foot-on-paper scan to verify v1.5.0 (non-white floor, toes slightly spread).

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: Daily transit loop live and well-received. Adding a moon-phase visual to the daily reading and verifying the transit ephemeris accuracy.
projects.nextStep: Claude is building the moon-phase visual; Jeremy is reviewing the TestFlight build to pick the next vision phase.

projects.name: irons-design
projects.note: Live on Cloudflare — resolving with valid SSL and the correct content.

projects.name: WEATHER
projects.note: App Store rejection (ITMS-90129) fixed — the bundle name was the generic word 'Weather'; now uniquely 'Weather: Between Us'. Committed (85d66ce).
projects.nextStep: Trigger a fresh Xcode Cloud build (will be build 22) and resubmit to App Store review.

projects.name: POSTURE
projects.note: Auto-capture (hands-free 4-view camera) shipped. Supabase keep-alive workflow pushed and fixed (URL secret had a trailing newline; workflow hardened).
projects.nextStep: Re-run the Keep-Alive workflow to confirm green; smoke-test auto-capture in Expo Go on your iPhone.

projects.name: Futon
projects.note: Homepage consolidated into one Progress section — rainbow-segmented bars for Kana, Kanji, Vocab, Grammar, each showing SRS state. Profile untouched. Staged.
projects.nextStep: Greenlight the consolidated Progress section to commit it.

projects.name: PAPPY
projects.note: v2.5.10 (billing null-guard + crash fix) deployed to Firebase and live for users.
